member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles authentication flows for client applications.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.LoginRequest.Password
member.summary: User password. In this mock API this is accepted for testing.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.RegisterRequest
member.summary: Request payload for registering a customer account.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateProfileRequest
member.summary: Request payload for updating the authenticated user's profile.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token for authorized calls.
member.remarks: In this mock implementation, users are auto-created when the email does not exist.
member.returns: JWT token and user profile details.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateMe(LewisStores.Api.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Updates the authenticated user's profile details.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.CartController.GetCart
member.summary: Returns all cart items for the current test cart.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.CartController.AddToCart(LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem)
member.summary: Adds an item to the cart.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.CartController.RemoveFromCart(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a cart item by internal database identifier.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Handles order retrieval and creation endpoints.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.CreateOrder(LewisStores.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.CreateOrderRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new order and returns the created resource.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.PaymentMethodsController
member.summary: Manages saved payment methods for authenticated users.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProducts
member.summary: Returns the full list of products.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProduct(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a single product by identifier.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController
member.summary: QA training endpoints for inspecting scenario flags and audit events.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.GetFlags
member.summary: Returns all QA feature flags with current state.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.UpdateFlag(System.String,LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.UpdateFlagRequest)
member.summary: Toggle a feature flag for QA scenario control.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.GetAuditLogs(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns recent audit events for student investigations.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.GetScenarioPacks
member.summary: Returns pre-defined scenario packs for instructor-led training.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.QaController.ApplyScenarioPack(System.String)
member.summary: Applies a scenario pack by updating grouped feature flags.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController
member.summary: Handles return and refund workflows for customer orders.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController.GetReturns
member.summary: Returns return requests. Support/admin roles can view all; customers view their own.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController.CreateReturn(LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController.CreateReturnRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new return request for the authenticated customer.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController.UpdateReturnStatus(System.Int32,LewisStores.Api.Controllers.ReturnsController.UpdateReturnStatusRequest)
member.summary: Updates a return request status and refund details.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController
member.summary: Handles support case creation and role-based support operations.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController.GetSupportCases(System.String)
member.summary: Lists support cases. Staff roles can view all; customers only see their own.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController.CreateSupportCase(LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController.CreateSupportCaseRequest)
member.summary: Creates a support case for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController.AssignSupportCase(System.Int32,LewisStores.Api.Controllers.SupportCasesController.AssignSupportCaseRequest)
member.summary: Assigns a support case to a support agent.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.Product
member.summary: Product entity shown in catalog and product listing views.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Product.OldPrice
member.summary: Previous price used for promotions, when available.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Product.Tag
member.summary: Optional promotional label, such as New or Sale.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Product.Category
member.summary: Product category used for filtering and merchandising.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Product.IsActive
member.summary: Indicates whether the product is currently active in the catalog.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.Category
member.summary: Category used to organize product catalog sections.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Category.To
member.summary: UI route destination associated with the category.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.Category.Tone
member.summary: Visual tone identifier used by the frontend.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem
member.summary: Cart line item representing a selected product and quantity.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem.InternalId
member.summary: Internal database key for the cart item.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem.Title
member.summary: Product title at the time it was added to cart.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem.Quantity
member.summary: Number of units in the cart.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CartItem.Price
member.summary: Unit price at time of cart update.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.User
member.summary: Application user model used for mock authentication.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.User.Password
member.summary: User password for mock login only.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.User.Role
member.summary: User role used in authorization claims.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.PaymentMethod
member.summary: Stored payment method linked to a user account.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.PaymentMethod.Expiry
member.summary: Expiry month and year in MM/YY format.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.PaymentMethod.IsDefault
member.summary: True when this is the default payment method.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.CreditApplication
member.summary: Credit application submitted by a user.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CreditApplication.ApplicationDate
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the application was submitted.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.CreditApplication.IdNumber
member.summary: National ID number supplied by the applicant.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.ReturnRequest
member.summary: Return and refund request raised against an order.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.ReturnRequest.UserId
member.summary: Customer/user identifier who submitted the request.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.ReturnRequest.Reason
member.summary: Return reason provided by the customer.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.ReturnRequest.RequestedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when request was submitted.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.ReturnRequest.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when request was last updated.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.SupportCase
member.summary: Customer support case linked to account and order activity.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.SupportCase.Priority
member.summary: Priority marker used by support teams.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.SupportCase.AssignedToUserId
member.summary: User identifier of assigned support agent.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.SupportCase.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the case was created.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.SupportCase.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the case was last updated.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.QaFeatureFlag
member.summary: Feature flag used to enable controlled training scenarios.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.QaFeatureFlag.IsEnabled
member.summary: True when the training scenario is active.

member.name: T:LewisStores.Api.Models.AuditLog
member.summary: Audit log entry for training investigations.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.AuditLog.UserId
member.summary: User identifier responsible for the event when available.

member.name: P:LewisStores.Api.Models.AuditLog.Details
member.summary: Event details payload in plain text JSON-like format.
